error_signature: HTML response instead of JSON from tmpfiles
title: Receiving HTML instead of JSON from tmpfiles.org
symptom: When uploading an image to tmpfiles.org, the response is HTML instead of the expected JSON containing the image URL.
not_this_if: Receiving correct JSON response from tmpfiles.org
root_cause: The URL returned from tmpfiles.org for the uploaded image may not be the direct download link. Instead, it could be a link to an HTML page that displays the image, which does not provide the required JSON format.
fix_steps: Modify the URL returned from tmpfiles.org by replacing 'tmpfiles.org/1626849/' with 'tmpfiles.org/dl/1626849/' to get the direct image link.
Use the modified URL in your Airtable upload process.
agent_instruction: Change the URL format to use the 'dl' path for direct image access.
safety_notes: Ensure the new URL is safe and does not lead to malware or unwanted content.
